subject: Payment Failed - Action Required
body: We were unable to process your payment of $499.00 for your subscription. Your card ending in 4242 was declined. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption. If you believe this is an error, please contact your bank.

subject: CRITICAL: Production Server Down - CPU 98% / Service Unavailable
body:
ALERT LEVEL: CRITICAL
Server: prod-web-01
Status: Service Unavailable
CPU Usage: 98%
Memory: 94%
Uptime: 0 minutes
Error: 500 Internal Server Error on all endpoints
Immediate action required. Automatic recovery failed.

subject: Your Weekly Tech Digest - Top Stories This Week
body: Good morning! Here are your top tech stories for this week. AI advancements, new product launches, and more. Click here to unsubscribe if you no longer wish to receive this newsletter. This is a promotional email.

subject: URGENT: System completely broken - clients cannot access portal
body: This is completely unacceptable. Our clients have been unable to access the customer portal for the past 3 hours. We are losing business every minute this is down. I demand immediate attention and a fix within the hour. If this is not resolved, we will be escalating to your CEO and considering legal action. This is a critical service failure.

subject: 🔥 Exclusive offer: 50% OFF everything today only! FREE GIFT inside
body: Congratulations! You have been selected for our exclusive 50% discount promotion. Click here to claim your free gift. Limited time offer! Unsubscribe | Privacy Policy | This is a promotional email.

subject: Invoice #INV-2026-0891 - Payment Overdue 30 Days
body: Dear Finance Team, This is a reminder that Invoice #INV-2026-0891 for $12,450.00 is now 30 days overdue. Despite previous reminders, we have not received payment. Please arrange payment immediately to avoid account suspension and late fees. Contact us at accounts@bigcorp.com.

subject: Your GitHub subscription renewal - Pro Plan
body: Your GitHub Pro plan will renew on July 1, 2026 for $7.00/month. No action needed if you wish to continue your subscription. To cancel or change your plan, visit your billing settings. Thank you for being a GitHub Pro member.

subject: ALERT: Database connection pool exhausted - all queries failing
body:
SEVERITY: HIGH
Component: PostgreSQL Database
Issue: Connection pool exhausted (500/500 connections used)
Impact: All API endpoints returning database errors
Started: 2026-06-08 09:15 UTC
Affected services: API, Dashboard, Worker
Reason: Memory leak in worker process causing connection leaks
Recommended action: Restart worker service, review connection cleanup code.

subject: Very disappointed with your service - considering switching providers
body: Hi, I have been a customer for 2 years and I am extremely frustrated with the recent service degradation. The platform has been slow, we have had 3 outages this month, and your support team took 48 hours to respond to a critical issue. I am seriously considering moving to a competitor. Please get back to me urgently with a plan to address these issues.

subject: Stories from your network - Today's top reads
body: Your daily Medium digest is ready. 5 new stories from writers you follow. Programming, AI, and productivity articles curated just for you. Unsubscribe from digest emails. View in browser.

subject: Your AWS bill is ready - Unusual charges detected
body: Your AWS bill for May 2026 is $4,892.34, which is 340% higher than your previous month ($1,101.22). Unusual charges have been detected in EC2 and data transfer. This may indicate unauthorized usage or a configuration error. Please review your usage immediately. Unrecognized charges should be reported within 30 days.

subject: New partner resources available this week
body: Hello partner! We have updated our resource library with new guides, templates, and marketing materials. Log in to your partner portal to access these resources. Questions? Contact partner-support@shopify.com. Unsubscribe from partner emails.

subject: TRIGGERED: High error rate - 500 errors spiking to 45%
body:
Incident #INC-44821 has been triggered.
Service: Production API
Alert: Error rate threshold exceeded
Current error rate: 45% (threshold: 5%)
Affected endpoints: /api/v2/payments, /api/v2/users
Started: 2026-06-08T11:30:00Z
On-call: DevOps Team
Acknowledge this incident immediately.

subject: 5 marketing strategies you need to know in 2026
body: This week we cover the top 5 digital marketing strategies for 2026. From AI-powered content to social media trends. Read our latest newsletter to stay ahead of the competition. Unsubscribe | View online | Privacy policy.

subject: Chargeback dispute - Transaction ID #TXN-928471
body: We are filing a chargeback dispute for transaction #TXN-928471 dated May 15, 2026 for $3,200.00. The services promised were not delivered as per our contract. We have notified our bank. If you wish to contest this chargeback, please provide proof of delivery within 7 business days. Contact: legal@corporate-enterprise.com

subject: Your Spotify Premium subscription renewed
body: Your Spotify Premium subscription has been renewed for another month. You have been charged $9.99. Your subscription is active until July 8, 2026. Manage your subscription in Account Settings. Need help? Visit our Help Center.

subject: CRITICAL: Disk usage at 97% on prod-db-01 - immediate action required
body:
CRITICAL ALERT
Host: prod-db-01
Disk Usage: 97% (threshold: 90%)
Free Space: 3.2 GB remaining
Impact: Database writes will fail when disk is full, causing complete service outage
Estimated time to full: 2 hours at current write rate
Action required: Clean up old logs, expand disk, or archive data immediately.

subject: You've won! Claim your $10,000 prize - limited time
body: CONGRATULATIONS! You have been randomly selected as our lucky winner. Claim your $10,000 prize now! Just click the link and enter your details. Offer expires in 24 hours. This is not spam - you are a genuine winner! Unsubscribe if you don't want more offers.

subject: Urgent: API integration completely broken after your last update
body: Hi Support Team, Since your platform update last night, our entire API integration has stopped working. We are getting 401 authentication errors on all endpoints despite using valid API keys. This is blocking our entire workflow - we process over 500 transactions per hour through your API. We need this fixed immediately. Our technical team is standing by. Please escalate this to your highest priority.

subject: Product Hunt Daily - Today's top products
body: Good morning! Here are today's top products on Product Hunt. Discover new tools, apps, and services launched today by makers from around the world. Browse, upvote, and comment. Unsubscribe from daily digest.
